<!-- Keep it small and focused. See CONTRIBUTING.md and METHOD.md. Delete lines that don't apply. -->

**What this changes and why:**

- [ ] Links resolve and any pinned case/hash checks still pass.
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated, and any artifact whose meaning changed had its minor version bumped (`0.1 → 0.2`).
- [ ] Added an ADR in `docs/decisions/` if this reflects a real decision (adopting, rejecting, or superseding an approach).
- [ ] Claims carry an evidence label (E0–E3) and disclose AI assistance (`[AI-assisted]`) per METHOD.md; no solo work is labeled "validated" or "independently corroborated".
